result.stdout:
Usage: vsmachelper [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information

Commands:
  CleanLogs                   This will clean the log folder
  CleanTelemetryLogs          removes the telemetry log files
  CompressLogs                This will create a .zip of the existing log files. The file will be created by default in the log directory
  DisableTelemetryFileLogger  disables telemetry file logger
  EnableTelemetryFileLogger   enables telemetry file logger
  KillVsmac                   This will kill the vsmac process and callstack will be written to the log file.
  OpenInstallerLogFolder      Opens the installer log directory
  OpenLogFolder               Opens the log folder in Finder
  OpenTelemetryConfigFolder   opens the telemetry config folder in Finder
  OpenTelemetryLogsFolder     opens the folder that contains the telemetry log files
  TailLog                     Tails the IDE log

Run 'vsmachelper [command] --help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: vsmachelper [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information

Commands:
  CleanLogs                   This will clean the log folder
  CleanTelemetryLogs          removes the telemetry log files
  CompressLogs                This will create a .zip of the existing log files. The file will be created by default in the log directory
  DisableTelemetryFileLogger  disables telemetry file logger
  EnableTelemetryFileLogger   enables telemetry file logger
  KillVsmac                   This will kill the vsmac process and callstack will be written to the log file.
  OpenInstallerLogFolder      Opens the installer log directory
  OpenLogFolder               Opens the log folder in Finder
  OpenTelemetryConfigFolder   opens the telemetry config folder in Finder
  OpenTelemetryLogsFolder     opens the folder that contains the telemetry log files
  TailLog                     Tails the IDE log

Run 'vsmachelper [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
This will clean the log folder

Usage: CleanLogs [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help               Show help information
  --verbose                  Enable verbose logging
  -l|--logfolderroot <PATH>  defines that path to the root folder containg the log files. Default value: '~/Library/Logs/VisualStudio'
  -v|--version <VERSION>     version number for VSMac [7.0 or 8.0]

  -v|--version <VERSION>     version number for VSMac [7.0 or 8.0]

result.stdout:
removes the telemetry log files

Usage: CleanTelemetryLogs [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information
  --verbose        Enable verbose logging
  -p|--folderPath  path to the folder that contains log files that will be deleted

commands.payload:
removes the telemetry log files

Usage: CleanTelemetryLogs [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information
  --verbose        Enable verbose logging
  -p|--folderPath  path to the folder that contains log files that will be deleted

result.stdout:
This will create a .zip of the existing log files. The file will be created by default in the log directory

Usage: CompressLogs [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help               Show help information
  --verbose                  Enable verbose logging
  -l|--logfolderroot <PATH>  defines that path to the root folder containg the log files. Default value: '~/Library/Logs/VisualStudio'
  -v|--version <VERSION>     version number for VSMac [7.0 or 8.0]
  -f|--filename              defines the filename of the log file that will be created. Default filename has a timestamp and version.

commands.payload:
This will create a .zip of the existing log files. The file will be created by default in the log directory

  -v|--version <VERSION>     version number for VSMac [7.0 or 8.0]
  -f|--filename              defines the filename of the log file that will be created. Default filename has a timestamp and version.

Usage: DisableTelemetryFileLogger [options]

Options:

  --verbose        Enable verbose logging
  -p|--folderPath  path to the telemetry config folder. Default path is '/tmp/inspectra-help-vsmach-3b8b2490-d7bd516e/home/VSTelemetry'
  -f|--filename    name of the file that will be modified. Default value is 'channels.json'

result.stdout:
This will kill the vsmac process and callstack will be written to the log file.

Usage: KillVsmac [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --verbose     Enable verbose logging
  -n|--name     Name of the process that will be killed. Default: 'VisualStudio'
  -i|--id       Process ID of the process to kill. If this and Process Name are passed, this will take precedent.

commands.payload:

Usage: KillVsmac [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --verbose     Enable verbose logging
  -n|--name     Name of the process that will be killed. Default: 'VisualStudio'
  -i|--id       Process ID of the process to kill. If this and Process Name are passed, this will take precedent.

result.stdout:
Tails the IDE log

Usage: TailLog [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information
  --verbose        Enable verbose logging
  -v|--ideversion  Version of VSmac - default is 8.0
  -f|--filepath    File path to the log file - default is /tmp/inspectra-help-vsmach-3b8b2490-d7bd516e/home/Library/Logs/VisualStudio/8.0/Ide.log
